name: Russian Helmets Aka Baked Eggs
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Red wine vinegar or herbal vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the stem section from the top of each tomato.
2. Scoop out the pulp and seeds using a spoon.
3. Sprinkle 1/2 tsp of red wine vinegar or vinegar into each tomato.
4. Break one egg into each tomato.
5. Place the tomatoes in a buttered baking pan.
6. Put the pan in a preheated oven set to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Bake until the eggs are set to your desired level of doneness.
8. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with salt and pepper, to taste.
9. Top each tomato with a small amount of butter.
